description.title: The fastest way from a digital strategy to working digital products
description.para1: At Sunesis we provide a wide range of services and our own innovative products to accelerate your digital transformation and bring digital products to life.
description.para2: We are a highly-skilled team with strong track record and extensive experience in designing, creating, developing and integrating complex cloud-native applications and information systems, utilizing microservices, APIs, containers, web, mobile, agile development practices, DevOps and Blockchain.
description.award-bold: Java Duke's Choice Award for technical innovation
description.para3: Advantages of working with us include agility, rapid development, quick time-to-market, close relation with the client, high quality and state-of-the-art technology skills.

core-services.title: Our capabilities
core-services.para1: Consulting, development and establishment of advanced AI agent platforms and other digital solutions.
core-services.para2: We offer a wide range of services that enable companies to transition into the age of intelligent business. Our expertise spans the entire spectrum - from planning agent architectures and establishing secure AI platforms to software modernization, cloud migration and development of complex microservice systems.
core-services.para3: We are constantly developing new competencies in the field of the most advanced technologies, where we currently put agent intelligence, autonomous systems and the safe use of generative artificial intelligence in the forefront, while maintaining excellence in microservice development, IoT and cloud-native solutions.

innovative-products.title: Our innovative products
innovative-products.para1: Meet Kumuluz, our family of innovative products and an award-winning digital platform, to help your development team accelerate your digital transformation and build digital products super-fast.
innovative-products.para2: Kumuluz Platform can help you stay ahead from your competitors in digital transformation

benefits.title: The core benefits of the microservice, cloud-native applications
benefits.description: In the hypercompetitive digital application economy, you cannot afford for your software to be a drawback
benefits.start:
Start developing your digital
applications in a future-proof way.

benefit1.title: Develop digital applications 300% faster
benefit1.description: With microservices and cloud-native architecture, agile approach and DevOps the application time-to-market can be improved by several orders of magnitude.

benefit2.title: Produce digital ready, flexible, adaptive and customizable applications
benefit2.description: Develop true digital-ready applications that are fully flexible, can adapt to customer needs faster and are fully customizable to address your digital strategy needs and adapt.

benefit3.title: Seize new business possibilities and digital business models
benefit3.description: Exploit digital channels to truly understand your customer needs in hours and days. Shorten the feedback loop. Sense the needs and respond immediately.

benefit4.title: Deliver new features more frequently
benefit4.description: Establish continuous integration and delivery and upgrade it to continuous everything. Add agile DevOps culture, environment, best-practices and tools. DevOps simplifies software application release management for an organization by standardizing development environments and improves reliability and security.
